description.value:
Frequency once per day.

Like the seeds of a dandelion or the intricate connections that allow raxilite Gowan starships to break apart into many smaller independent vessels, you've engineered your body and equipment to be able to break apart into smaller pieces.

In this state, you're amorphous. You lose any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and you use your proficiency rank in unarmored defense. You gain resistance 8 to physical damage and are immune to precision damage. You can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. You gain a fly Speed of 10 feet if you didn't already have a fly Speed, and you can slip through tiny cracks. You can reassemble your body and your gear as a single action. If you haven't reassembled yourself after 5 minutes, safety protocols automatically activate to rebuild you.
